name: Holstein Friesian
description: Among the most well-liked dairy cow for qurbani worldwide is the Holstein Friesian. It is well-known for its eye-catching black and white markings and well-regarded for producing large amounts of milk. Though mostly bred for dairy, Holstein Friesians produce a sizable amount of meat as well. They are appropriate for Qurbani because of their size, which provides plenty of flesh to share with loved ones and the less fortunate.

name: Angus
description: Scottish-bred Angus cattle are famous for having the highest quality meat. Their delicate, well-marbled beef makes them a favourite among Qurbani. Because of their calm disposition and ability to adjust to different temperatures, Angus cows are highly valued, which is advantageous throughout the Qurbani process.

name: Billy
description: For Billy Goat turf equipment, maximize performance by keeping blades sharp and clearing deck clogs, as dull blades and clogged decks significantly reduce efficiency. Use a fuel stabilizer to prevent carburetor issues during off-seasons. In dry, hard soil, add maximum weight to drum aerators for proper plug depth.

name: Oscar
description: Saanen goats, often called the are renowned for being the highest milk-producing breed, typically yielding 3-5 litres daily. Originating from Switzerland, they are large, docile, pure white or cream-colored, and ideal for commercial dairy farming.
